questions: What did IAB find about cross‑media combinations?
How do digital and TV work together?
qa.answer: Cross‑media plans combining TV and digital often outperform single‑channel plans on incremental reach and brand lift. Digital adds efficient reach, especially among lighter TV viewers.
implication: Blend TV/AV with digital to extend reach and improve frequency distribution.
Plan creative and sequencing across channels for consistency and lift.
Measure cross‑media lift with calibrated MMM and brand lift studies.
